about.title: About Our Municipal Corporation
about.subtitle: Historic Urban Institution named after Chhatrapati Sambhaji Maharaj
about.desc_p1: Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar Municipal Corporation (CSMC) is the administrative body responsible for the administration and development of Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar, a city historically and culturally rich in Maharashtra.
about.desc_p2: Named in honor of Chhatrapati Sambhaji Maharaj, the city is known for its unique blend of heritage, education, industry, and modernity.

services.title: Citizen Services
services.description: Avail all services online from the comfort of your home. Simple, fast, and secure.
services.all_services_desc: Consolidated list of all available citizen services
services.tax_desc: Property tax payment and receipt search
services.water_desc: Water bill check and online payment
services.complaint_desc: File new complaint without logging in
services.certificates_desc: Birth, death, and marriage certificate copies
services.legend: 🔒 Citizen Login is required for marked services

officials.title: Municipal Officials
officials.description: Leadership determining and executing the policies for city development.

news.title: Latest News & Announcements
news.description: Important announcements, decisions, and updates from the corporation.

social.title: Connect on Social Media
social.description: Get direct updates from our Facebook, Instagram, and YouTube channels.

quick_links.title: Quick Links
quick_links.description: Other important government portals and information archives.

footer.about_desc: Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar Municipal Corporation is working for the development of our city and services for citizens.
